hero.title: Personal Stylist
hero.tagline: a wardrobe that reflects you and works as a system

philosophy.label: About me
philosophy.heading: Style is communication|before you say a word
philosophy.p1: My name is Margarita, and I'm a personal stylist.
philosophy.p2: For me, style is about confidence, comfort, and authenticity. It's the connection between how you feel inside and how you present yourself to the world.
philosophy.p3: I enjoy helping people unlock their potential through style and believe it can become a powerful tool of self-expression.
philosophy.p4: Rather than encouraging impulsive purchases, I focus on thoughtful styling and the potential of well-chosen wardrobe pieces.
philosophy.p5: For over 4 years, I've been working as a personal stylist. I've also styled photoshoots and previously created my own brand of leather bags and accessories.
philosophy.quote: Style is communication before you say a word. It is your quiet power.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Audit
wardrobe.desc: You often find yourself staring at a full closet but still feel like you have nothing to wear. We go through every piece together, build outfit formulas, and create a shopping list for the missing essentials.
wardrobe.duration: Online - 15 business days. Offline - up to 4 hrs (each additional hour + S$ 100)

for: You often find yourself staring at a full closet but still feel like you have nothing to wear.
You need efficient outfit formulas to get dressed faster in the morning.
You've experienced major life changes, like moving to a new city or starting a new job, and need a wardrobe update.
Your current wardrobe doesn't reflect who you are now or how you wish to present yourself.
You want your wardrobe to speak for you, showcasing your taste, vision, and character.
online_steps: In the online format, I will also ask you to fill out a questionnaire and schedule a pre-analysis consultation to ensure we're on the same page.

Online wardrobe analysis can be done in two formats: photo and video. Photo Analysis: You send me photos and videos of all the items on the clean surface (background) and the same items on you. I create a presentation, and we choose a convenient time to discuss all the details via Zoom.

or Video Analysis: We schedule a convenient time for a video call and analyze everything live. You will receive a file with all the recommendations, screenshots of the outfits we created, and a shopping list a few days after the call.
You also have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
offline_steps: Style Quiz — You'll start by completing a short quiz. It helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals before we begin.
Pre-Consultation — We'll have a quick chat to connect, make sure the energy flows well between us, and set a convenient day for your wardrobe audit.
Wardrobe Audit (at your home) — On the scheduled day, I come to your place and together we go through every single piece in your closet.

Final Report & Recommendations — Within 14 business days, you'll receive a personalized file that includes a summary of everything we discussed, styling recommendations + shopping links for all key missing pieces to make your wardrobe more versatile and functional.
You also have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
details.notes: One session typically lasts up to 4 hours. If your wardrobe is extensive, we may plan a second session — after 4 hours, it becomes mentally draining for both of us (trust me!). During the session, I take photos of all the items we decide to keep. Then uploaded to a special app, where your entire wardrobe will live in one convenient place. You'll be able to browse your looks, plan outfits, mix and match pieces, and easily see what you already own — all from your phone.

shopping.title: Shopping curation
shopping.desc: A service designed to complement your existing wardrobe with new items, helping to create a fully functional wardrobe or building one from scratch for the season. Please note: this service is only offered after we have completed a wardrobe revamp. If you want to create a wardrobe from scratch, please refer to the Capsule Wardrobe service.
shopping.duration: Online: 7–10 business days. Offline: up to 4 hrs (each additional hour + S$ 100)

for: You've completed a wardrobe audit and want to find the new pieces we agreed on.
You want to quickly resolve a purchase and choose the best from available options.
If you want to create a wardrobe from scratch, please refer to the Capsule Wardrobe service.
online_steps: We will schedule a pre-consultation to discuss your request and details.
We create a list of items relevant to your needs and style direction.

Within 7–10 business days you will receive: General style guidance. A shopping list with items selected according to your body type, needs and budget. Complete outfit suggestions incorporating items from the shopping list. Two weeks of follow-up support to address any issues with the items as they arrive. I will find and recommend alternative products if needed.
You also have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
offline_steps: We will schedule a pre-consultation to discuss your request and details.
We create a list of items relevant to your needs and style direction.
I do a pre-shopping for your convenience and to save time.
We combine offline and online purchases due to limited stock and sizing. The offline session takes up to 4 hours (every hour after will cost 100 S$).
You also have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the wardrobe review, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
details.notes: Be aware that: Each item selected can be replaced once within 2 weeks. Buying many items at once can be mentally challenging due to the high cost. If it's hard to buy everything at once, follow the list when possible and focus on the details such as material, length, and cut I selected previously. P.S. Working with a stylist can be overwhelming due to the volume of new information. Give yourself time and everything will work out :) This service is a combined approach due to the specifics of shopping in Singapore. For mass-market and mid-range items, I would recommend ordering online from my curated selections and trying the items at home (via video, photos, or an in-person visit) due to the limitations of store availability. For luxury items, you have the option to select the shopping method you prefer. Nonetheless, online shopping usually provides a better range and selection, making it easier to find unique and special items with the convenience of home fitting. If this option isn't suitable, I will create a shopping route, reserve items in offline stores and showrooms, and assist you in selecting items. I respect your time and aim to offer the best service possible.

capsule.title: Capsule wardrobe
capsule.desc: Creating a capsule wardrobe involves selecting pieces that work seamlessly together, tailored to your style and needs. This could be a seasonal capsule, for vacation or business trip, trend-based, or timeless, depending on your preferences and values.
capsule.duration: Around 14–20 business days (depending on capsule size)

for: Saves a significant amount of time that would otherwise be spent shopping in stores or online.
Provides a comprehensive selection where all pieces coordinate with each other.
Ensures that you purchase only items that truly fit, you like, and will be used.
Items are chosen within a price range that suits you.
steps: Quiz and style test — helps me understand your lifestyle, preferences, and goals.
Pre-consultation — to ask questions, discuss your expectations, and see if we share the same vision.
It takes around 14–20 days to create the capsule (depending on its size).
After you receive the file, we schedule a follow-up call where I explain how it works and answer all your questions.
You also have 2 extra weeks to ask me any questions that arise about the capsule, new pieces, or any wardrobe-related issues.
My full support and guidance throughout the ordering process, including finding alternatives and discussing fit and nuances in online shopping.

You will receive a functional selection of items that coordinate well together, offering various combinations and purposes from a relatively small number of pieces (quantity and budget are discussed in advance).
details.notes: P.S. Quality is my priority, which might lead to higher costs. I will present several options but focus on durable, stylish pieces, avoiding too much synthetic material from mass-market brands. The capsule is built from new pieces (up to 5 items from your existing wardrobe can be included).

event.title: Event / shoot looks
event.desc: For any event where you need to look your best and feel confident — be it a wedding, a public appearance, or a formal gathering — we'll create the perfect outfit.

for: You need to look your best and feel confident at an important event.
You're preparing for a wedding, public appearance, photoshoot, or formal gathering.
steps: We will have a consultation for the main points: budget, style, and preferences.
I will then put together 3 outfit options considering the theme and dress code of the event and send those choices for you to pick the best one.
The outfit can either be assembled from your current wardrobe or include new items and accessories tailored for your event.
details.notes: The price for this service varies depending on the complexity of the outfit and the work format. From 250 S$ per outfit.

mentoring.title: Monthly Mentoring
mentoring.desc: Direct access to your stylist. Price: S$350/month or S$300/month for a 3-month subscription.

for: You've already worked with me and want consistent support to maintain and grow your style.
You often doubt your choices and want to have a professional "on call" to guide you.
You want to shop smarter — saving time, money, and energy while investing only in what truly works for you.
steps: Direct access to your stylist — You can reach out anytime during the day. I'm here to support you, guide your choices, and help you stay confident in your decisions. (We agree on communication hours individually so you can always count on my timely response within my working schedule.)

Shopping guidance — Planning a store visit or shopping online? Message me before or during your shopping trip — I'll help you decide whether a piece is worth buying or better to skip. We coordinate your shopping time in advance so I can stay available while you're trying things on, making the process quick and effortless.
Outfit and item curation — Creating outfits for various occasions. Support in choosing specific categories (e.g. "I need the perfect white shirt" or "help me find everyday jeans").
Personalized product search — I'll help you find what you're looking for — from the right silhouette to the right store — with attention to quality, fit, and value.
Stylist's recommendations — Ongoing advice, inspiration, and support throughout the month — tailored to your pace and lifestyle.
details.notes: This is not deep personal coaching. I provide professional advice and recommendations, but final decisions remain entirely yours. My goal is to guide, not to impose — helping you make conscious, confident, and independent style choices. Price: S$350/month or S$300/month for a 3-month subscription.

1.title: Style Quiz
1.desc: We begin with a short questionnaire designed to help me understand you better — your lifestyle, preferences, and personal goals.

2.title: Pre - Consultation
2.desc: A 30–45 minute call where we connect, align on your goals and vision, discuss key details, and schedule a convenient time to begin.

3.title: Core Process
3.desc: Depending on the service you choose, I conduct a wardrobe audit, curate new pieces, and carefully develop all styling materials tailored to you.

4.title: Final Report
4.desc: You receive a personalized file with detailed recommendations, complete outfit combinations, shopping links, your style direction, and all essential insights.

5.title: Ongoing Support
5.desc: For two weeks after receiving the file, you have my full support during working hours for any questions, adjustments, or guidance you may need.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.note: All prices in S$. Each additional hour billed separately.

wardrobe_audit.title: Wardrobe Audit
wardrobe_audit.desc: Offline (up to 4 hrs, each extra hour + S$ 100) or online (15 business days)

shopping.title: Shopping Assistance
shopping.desc: Personal shopping day offline (up to 4 hrs, + S$ 100/hr) or online curation (7–10 business days)

travel_capsule.title: Travel Capsule Wardrobe
travel_capsule.desc: Up to 15 items — vacation, business trip, or any focused wardrobe need. 7–10 business days.

seasonal_capsule.title: Seasonal Capsule Wardrobe
seasonal_capsule.desc: Up to 30 items for the full season. 14–20 business days. Complete outfit combinations included.

event.title: Event / Photoshoot Styling
event.desc: 3 outfit options tailored to your event. Price varies by complexity and format.

experience.label: Values
experience.1: dress for the woman you are becoming

modal.for_whom: This service is for you if:

cta.heading: Lets build a refined | wardrobe that works
